enrichment method: the phosphopeptides were eluted with 50 μl of elution buffer (40% ACN, 15% NH4OH), followed by lyophilization and MS analysis.
fractionation method: Each sample (20 μg) was then prefractionated using 12% SDS-PAGE.
instrument: MS was carried out with a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: peptides were analyzed in positive ion mode
labeling: the resulting tryptic peptides were labeled according to the protocol of iTRAQ Reagent-8 plex Multiplex Kit
